text.title: AI IaC Hallucination Detector Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for ai-iac-hallucination-detector.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the change include applied-against-real-cloud IaC?

example.trace: Agent writes `resource "aws_dynamodb_globaltable" "foo" {}` → schema lookup fails → suggestion `aws_dynamodb_global_table` (edit-distance 1) → verdict=fail.
